requiresLive.description: Public URLs under registry.jami.studio actually serve these preview bytes with correct content-type and cache headers.
studio-ui init/add/provenance succeed against the hosted registry URL (clean-project remote install smoke).
Hosted docs routes (e.g. /docs/registry, /docs/workbench) return healthy responses, not HTTP 500.

missingHumanActions: Define revisioned-item URL policy for long-lived registry artifacts.
Implement hosted persistence and backend package registration before claiming save/register across sessions.
